introSection: Speedy Coaster is a steel kiddie roller coaster built by Italian manufacturer Pinfari currently located at Rhyl Children's Village in Rhyl, Denbighshire, Wales, UK.

sections.title: Design
sections.content: Speedy Coaster is a Big Apple MB28 model, wich uses the Big Apple / Wacky Worm standard track layout.

sections.title: History
sections.content: The ride originally opened under the name Big Apple at Barry's Amusements in 1998. In 2010, the name was changed to Speedy Mouse, although the park's website continued to call it the Big Apple.

fullText:
Speedy Coaster is a steel kiddie roller coaster built by Italian manufacturer Pinfari currently located at Rhyl Children's Village in Rhyl, Denbighshire, Wales, UK.

Speedy Coaster is a Big Apple MB28 model, wich uses the Big Apple / Wacky Worm standard track layout.

The ride originally opened under the name Big Apple at Barry's Amusements in 1998. In 2010, the name was changed to Speedy Mouse, although the park's website continued to call it the Big Apple.
